DTR | Listen to a Speaker Support an Opinion
LSO-MS8-L3-300650-MSSCI8-DBC-NAV-01 | MS Science: Grade 8 | Electric and Magnetic Forces and Their Factors | Design-Build Challenge | North American Voices
Every Loop Counts
Click 🎧 to listen.
Listen to a conversation between two students. The girl is discussing her opinion about the best way to build a stronger electromagnet. Listen carefully. You will hear the conversation only once. After listening, you will answer four questions about the conversation and the evidence the girl gives to support her opinion. As you listen, you may take notes.
Listen to the Conversation
1QUESTION 1:
Why does the girl mention the giant crane at the scrapyard?
2QUESTION 2:
How does the girl know that more loops make the magnet stronger?
3QUESTION 3:
What does the girl say happened in the test they did in club?
4QUESTION 4:
Why does the girl think adding loops is better than using a bigger battery for the challenge?
Answer all 4 questions to submit.
Choose the best answer for each question. You may change your answers before submitting.
